bugs.error_message: AI file analysis never returns / 401-style failure
bugs.root_cause: runAIAnalysis fetched api.anthropic.com directly from the renderer with no API key, no anthropic-version header, and no browser-access flag (CORS).
bugs.fix: Moved the call to the Electron main process (ipc 'analyze') with x-api-key + anthropic-version headers; key stored in archlog-settings.json, never exposed to renderer; renderer calls window.archlog.analyze().

bugs.error_message: PDF attachments produce garbage text in AI analysis
bugs.root_cause: main.js read .pdf files as UTF-8; PDFs are binary, so content was unusable.
bugs.fix: Added extractText() using pdf-parse for .pdf; plain UTF-8 only for text extensions (.txt/.eml/.md/.csv/...). Added pdf-parse to package.json dependencies.

bugs.error_message: Stray markup 'ltip' rendered in sidebar header
Junk directory named '{src,assets}' in project root
bugs.root_cause: Brace-expansion mishap from an earlier mkdir (quotes/no-brace-expansion).
